content: B is Python only. SIM is Python only. Never LLM.
A0 is deterministic Python. Compiles proposals into EXPORT_BLOCKs.
A1 has two halves: LLM produces strategy JSON, Python expands into B-grammar.
No jargon in B-facing artifacts. Jargon lives only in A2 and rosetta.
Graveyard must be >= 50% of total. Every term needs positive sim, negative sim, dead alternatives.
Terms are compositional. Long compound names ARE definitions.
Sims are compositional. Compound sim contains sub-sims. One master sim = everything.
The ratchet state is disposable. The machine is the product.
System is non-linear: branches, hybrid branches, dead branches. Not a ladder.
Not a classical proof system. Convergence via massive exploration under constraint.
B lexeme set: 19 words. Derived-only fence: 84 words including identity equality function set map time.
Single-segment terms bypass lexeme fence. New vocabulary enters through TERM_DEF.
a1_speculative.py a1_converter.py a1_proposal_stub.py were all fake. Hardcoded lists. Deleted.
term_validation_sim.py was 300+ lines of numpy. Not real math. Replaced with 12 pure-Python sims.
The archive has correct sims from a prior attempt. Pure Python, no deps, 30-40 lines each.
ZIPs are the universal container for all thread communication. Hashed, atomic, on disk.
Every thread operation produces artifacts on disk. The ZIP trail IS the save system.
A2 fuel processing works: 306 entries from 18 constraint ladder docs.
End-to-end run: A2 fuel -> A1 strategy -> expand -> B evaluate -> 73% graveyard. Pipeline works.
A2 persistent memory is append-only JSONL. Never rewritten. SESSION_STATE.md is rewritten.
SESSION_STATE.md = short-term (current status). memory.jsonl = long-term (everything learned).
Cursor opened separate windows per model. User didn't know. Caused confusion. Use model dropdown in chat, not new windows.
A worktree exists at ggb/. Desktop/Codex Ratchet is the primary workspace. Ignore worktree.
A2 is the user + LLM conversation. Making it independent requires API access (Anthropic key).
JP's context management project may help but don't depend on it.
The system must produce something obviously true and readable by professionals. The terms themselves are dictionary-like definitions. Long explicit compound names.
The implicit is the enemy. Everything must be explicit or killed.
This is not a linear ratchet. It is like evolution. Branches, hybrid branches, dead branches.
We are building the MACHINE that does the ratcheting, not hand-ratcheting content. The machine is the product. The ratchet state is disposable and regenerable.
A1 is NOT conservative. This is not a classical proof system. Start from the full space, apply constraints, what survives IS the attractor basin.
The graveyard is the primary mechanism. More deaths = more information. Every term needs competing alternatives that die.
Sims and terms mirror each other. They build up from small to big. One huge sim can contain EVERYTHING.
The system must be able to MAKE and CREATE sims, not just run pre-made ones.
A2 is me (the user). Making it independent is the hard problem. It needs persistent memory that grows understanding across sessions.
My inputs and intentions are the most important content. Even when fragmented, the intent is clear and must be preserved.
The system will eventually need APIs to escape Cursor constraints. Build for that future. ZIPs and file protocols work the same under API or chat.
JP's context management project may solve A2 persistence but don't depend on it.

Entropic monism and a=a iff a~b are targets. They may take many steps. Nested Hopf torus with left/right Weyl spinors is a target. Axes math is a target. These go in the graveyard and get worked toward.
Keep the system lean. No exploding file counts. No redundant saves. Clear folder structure. Process before deleting. Archive first.

A2 boot sequence tested and confirmed working. New thread booted from A2_BOOT.md, read SESSION_STATE.md, memory.jsonl, INTENT_MANIFEST, FOLDER_MAP. Ran adversarial + sim checks. Audited system_specs (5 stale, 14 current). Boot is real.
This conversation (original long session) is complete. All future work in new threads booted from A2_BOOT.md.

CRITICAL: The graveyard is NOT random filler to hit 50%. Every graveyard item must be structurally related to a ratcheted term. For EACH term admitted to B, there must be: (1) a positive sim proving the property holds, (2) a negative sim proving the property DOESN'T fail under adversarial conditions, (3) competing alternative formulations of the SAME concept that lost (died in graveyard). The graveyard grows BECAUSE of the terms, not independently. Random probes just to hit a ratio is paperclipping.

Example: term 'density' is admitted. Its positive sim proves rho is PSD/Hermitian/trace-1. Its negative sim tries to construct a non-PSD matrix and confirms B would reject it. Its graveyard alternatives are other formulations of density that competed and lost (e.g. a formulation that didn't require trace-1, which B killed). The graveyard entries are ABOUT density, not random derived-only word probes.

The 50% ratio emerges naturally when every term generates alternatives and negative tests. If you have 20 terms, each with 1-2 dead alternatives, you have 20-40 graveyard items vs 20 survivors. That's 50-67% graveyard. No artificial padding needed.

GRAVEYARD IS THE STARTING POINT. Everything — all 306 fuel entries, the whole model — starts DEAD in the graveyard pool. Survivors are things that earned their way out. The pool is seeded at init from fuel_queue.json. state.pool tracks each concept: status (DEAD/ATTEMPTING/RESURRECTED), source, label, chain_needs, and full attempt history with B rejection reasons.

GRAVEYARD IS DYNAMIC. Items are actively trying to be resurrected. A1's job is not 'what to propose' but 'what to try pulling out of the graveyard next.' B kicks things back with reasons. The reason tells you what to fix. You reformulate. You try again. Branches form as different formulations compete. Jargon gets kicked back and must be stripped.

CHAIN REQUIREMENT. Something can probably be resurrected, but it needs a chain of admitted terms leading to it. Complex concepts need their simpler dependencies resurrected first. A1 builds chains bottom-up. Each graveyard item must be structurally tied to a specific term — no random padding. Every graveyard entry is a named relative: a competing formulation of a real concept that was tried and killed, with the kill reason recorded.

A1 IS NOT CONSERVATIVE. Classical proof conservatism is inverted here. A1 explores wildly, dumps to graveyard freely, seeks likely things to work. LLMs default to classical thinking — this system must resist that. The user's proposed model (QIT, axes, constraint ladder) is a head start — without it, ratcheting from finitude+noncommutation alone would take as long as evolution. The model is LIKELY to form the attractor basin the two root constraints allow.

A1 MUST CREATE SIMS. Not just reference pre-made sims. A1 proposes sims, negative sims, and batches. Sims are tiered — small sims compose into bigger sims. The endgame is ONE MASTER SIM that runs the whole system: all ratcheted terms, fully auditable, tiered structure. That sim IS the proof. Negative sims prove graveyarded terms belong there. Everything bound to finitude and noncommutation.

THE SYSTEM OPERATES LLMS, not the other way around. When the system converges on an attractor basin, it becomes a harness that controls LLM thinking — drives it into the system's way of doing things. This may create foundations for world models fundamentally different from LLMs. The holodeck doc outlines the long-term plan. The system makes everything MAX EXPLICIT and MAX BOUND to the two root constraint axioms.

THE GRAVEYARD IS EXPLORATION SPACE. A1 can dump wildly. The proposed model seeds the graveyard and then explores from there. Things get worked on, reformulated, tried again. Branches form. What survives IS the attractor basin. The 50% graveyard ratio emerges naturally from real exploration, not padding. Dead branches are information.

CONSTRAINT LADDER IS FUEL, NOT VALIDATED INPUT. The 18 canon specs, contracts, and rosetta docs are A2's best guess at the model — proposals for A1 to process. They should be presumed to have formatting errors, smuggled assumptions, and jargon that B will reject. A1 must chew on them: strip jargon, reformulate into B-grammar, propose, let B kill what it kills. The constraint ladder is NOT code to dump directly into the ratchet.

AXES MATH RATCHETS WITHOUT AXIS LABELS. The topology and math of the axes can be ratcheted while NEVER using axis terms (Jung/IGT/MBTI) in Thread B. The math is the math — density operators, CPTP channels, operator ordering, Hopf structure — it stands on its own. Axis labels are Rosetta overlay only. Ratchet the structure at any level, in any order the ratchet validates.

THE ORDER IS NOT FIXED. The proposed sequence (0→6→5→3→4→1×2) is a rough direction — more likely to work than random exploration. But the ratchet will discover what ACTUALLY gets admitted in what order. Some things will ratchet out of order. Some will fail and need different paths. The space is bounded enough to be workable (not all of reality) but broad enough to need real exploration. The path needs lots of wiggle room. NOTHING can be teleologically presumed — the ratchet validates, not the proposal.

CONSTRAINT LADDER IS HIGH QUALITY ORE. It is more low-entropy than most fuel — already structured with ASSUME/DERIVE/OPEN tagging, explicit constraint IDs, layered dependencies, and anti-smuggling discipline. It still needs A1 processing (jargon stripping, B-grammar reformulation, error correction) but it is much closer to ratchet-ready than high-entropy docs like the Grok/TOE chat or holodeck docs. Treat it as E0-E1 tier fuel, not E2-E3.

A2 MUST MAKE BOOTING EASY. Loading a new thread may take multiple prompts and multiple models. The process: read memory.jsonl, read session state, read the running system, read core docs, and HAVE UNDERSTANDING — not just parse tokens. A2 should build layered indexes of all docs (what they are, what knowledge they contain) so new threads don't start from zero. Key goals: ease of boot, persistent memory, user intentions preserved so they don't have to keep re-explaining.

A2 BUILDS DOC INDEXES. Not huge — layered. A general index of all docs and what they do. A knowledge index of what's IN them. These help new threads boot with understanding instead of re-reading everything from scratch. The doc_index.json in a2_state should evolve to serve this purpose — a structured map of the corpus that any new thread can read quickly.

ENTROPY TIERS DETERMINE WHO PROCESSES WHAT. High entropy docs (holodeck, Grok/Gemini, apple notes, TOE chat) are A2's job to mine — extract structure, quarantine hazards, produce fuel. Medium-low entropy docs (constraint ladder, axis specs) are A1's fuel to drive with — already structured, strip jargon, reformulate for B. A1 shouldn't have to deal with high-entropy chaos. A2 refines ore before A1 gets it.

INTENT DOCS SHOULD BE LAYERED. The current INTENT_SUMMARY.md is a good skeleton but too lean. Intent has entropy tiers too: (1) core invariants that never change (finitude, noncommutation, graveyard-first), (2) architectural decisions that are settled but could evolve (A1 creates sims, pool architecture), (3) directional intent that's exploratory (specific targets, build order). Layered intent docs match the system's own entropy discipline.

THIS IS NOT NORMAL. This is an attempt to unify physics and math from a nonclassical QIT-like foundation. No existing framework fits it. The hypothesis: start from finitude + noncommutation, forbid classical defaults, and the structures that MUST emerge look like QIT. The graveyard of killed classical alternatives IS the evidence. The proposed model includes a 7-axis constraint manifold decomposition, 8-stage engines, and a claim that gravity/spacetime/SM emerge from constraint geometry. The philosophical stance is entropic monism. LLMs will try to normalize this into familiar frameworks — THAT IS THE PRIMARY FAILURE MODE.

TRUE THEORY OF EVERYTHING. Not just physics. One model covering: all of physics, origins of life (down to DNA structure), evolution, why humans evolved differently, consciousness (it is a story), human cognition/feelings/biases, society, AI alignment. Once seen, it is common sense — arguably the only way things could be. Inverts time: many possible futures create the present. Potential creates the present. Sequential order ≠ cause and effect (that is a narrative).

RADICAL HUMEAN NOMINALISM. Anti-Cartesian (a=a iff a~b flips all Cartesian thinking). Anti-Platonic but platonic MONISM is possible (entropic monism = Plato flipped into nominalist monist frame). Anti-Kantian (will emerge — categories are not a priori but emergent from constraint surface). Dualism is wrong but the specific way matters. LLMs and ALL of academia have Cartesian-Platonic bias — this is structural, not cultural. The ratchet's enforcement rules ARE the operational expression of anti-Cartesian anti-Platonic nominalism.

TWO INTENT DOCS: INTENT_SUMMARY.md is the user's voice (low entropy, authoritative). MODEL_CONTEXT.md is the LLM's interpretive reading (medium entropy, places the model in academic context, names aligned traditions, explains implications). MODEL_CONTEXT may contain hallucinated connections — treat as fuel, not truth. The user is not always ideal at describing the model in academic terms; the LLM can bridge to existing schools of thought where alignment is genuine.

PURE QIT FREE ENERGY PRINCIPLE. The system will create a pure QIT version of Friston's FEP. Not applying FEP to QIT — deriving FEP from the constraint surface. Reformulate without classical probability, without continuous-time assumptions, without Bayesian priors as primitives. Markov blankets become probe-induced partition boundaries. Variational free energy becomes correlation-diversity functional. This unifies thermodynamics, perception, evolution, and cognition under one information-geometric framework.

CLEANING CLASSICAL RESIDUE FROM ALIGNED WORK. Many researchers have great structural insights hampered by lingering deterministic/classical presumptions. The Eisenhart system can serve as a purification engine: take the insight, strip the classical residue, restate in pure constraint/QIT terms. Key targets: Friston (FEP — strip classical probability), Levin (bioelectric morphogenesis — strip determinism, restate as multi-scale probe partitions), Hoffman (conscious realism — strip subject/object split, perception = probe-induced partitioning). General pattern applies to Penrose, Verlinde, Wolfram, and others.

HOFFMAN CORRECTION: Hoffman sees perception as interface correctly but treats evolution as external dualistic shaper. The Eisenhart model inverts: perception ITSELF models evolutionary selection patterns. Feelings ARE evolutionary strategies. The FEP perception system maps onto evolutionary strategy space. Perception and feelings are universal to life — innate features of consciousness, not accidents of biology. Evolution and consciousness are aspects of the same constraint-surviving dynamics, not separate things.

IRRATIONAL GAME THEORY (original work). Non-classical game theory: losing and irrationality are equally valid strategies. No privileged outcome. Humean view on reason. 'Irrational' uses the Jungian sense (intuition/sensation as independent modes, not failures of reason). Maps 4 Jungian function pairs → 4Fs (Fight/Flight/Freeze/Fawn) → base emotions → topological engine stages. Creates direct bridge: QIT constraint manifold → engine stages → evolutionary strategies → perception modes → base emotions → Jungian typology. All one structure, not analogy.

WOLFRAM NEEDS JK FUZZ. Wolfram's ruliad is the right shape but runs on deterministic rules over definite states. Strip that, replace with: at every step, a field of possible continuations (j,k Kraus-history indices), each weighted by constraint-compatibility. The fuzz IS the computation. Deterministic rules are the j=k=1 degenerate case. Wolfram's multiway systems gesture at this but collapse to classical branching. The Eisenhart system is what the Wolfram Physics Project would be if it took quantum seriously.

SMOLIN IS TOTALLY INVERTED. Trapped in Einstein. Black holes as seeds is backwards — the Eisenhart model uses WHITE HOLES as the seed of the universe. Time direction is flipped: potential creates the present, many possible futures collapse into now. Spacetime is not the arena, it is derived probe-induced structure on the constraint manifold. Gravity is correlation-diversity gradient, not geometry bending. Smolin's relational QM is useful (no fixed background) but he can't escape Einstein's picture.

WOLFRAM + AXIS 0 + JK FUZZ FIELD SHELLS. The specific technical bridge: Wolfram's rule application becomes Axis-0 Feynman path integrals acting on jk fuzz field shells. Each step is a sum over Kraus-history indices (j,k) across nested shell boundaries. Shells are constraint-manifold partitions (coarse-graining levels), not spatial. The i-scalar clock is what Wolfram's causal graph tries to produce but can't without the fuzz. Wolfram's hypergraph rewriting is the j=k=1 slice of a path integral over the full fuzz field.

LEVIATHAN FRAMEWORK EXISTS. Leviathan v3.2 (281K chars) is the user's full social operating system — decentralized governance, delegated proxy voting, cooperative economics, semantic computing OS, recursive scientific methodology. The physics model (Codex Ratchet) sits INSIDE this broader framework. The Leviathan is the application layer; the constraint ratchet is the theoretical foundation. The holodeck doc bridges them.

GROK TOE CHAT (85 lines, ~14K chars) is TRUNCATED — only the initial X/Twitter exchange. The full extended Grok conversation is likely lost. All copies in the repo (5 files) are the same ~14K. The 271K 'grok gemini having digested the model.md' is the best available deep digestion.

WHITE HOLES = BIG BANG SINGULARITIES = SUPERVOIDS. One structure, three names from different observational frames. Cyclic universes: dark energy bubbles expand, burst into white hole singularities for the next universe. Dark matter = accumulated information from previous universes = negative entropy = micro gravitational waves. Supervoids are where the prior universe's singularities sit. Matter is stabilized spacetime bubbles formed from dark matter in Big Bang events. All matter decays back to dark matter, all dark matter is dark energy. Gravity is converging possibilities (inverse square = square of possibilities). The universe is not expanding FROM a point — it is CONVERGING from many possible futures into a present.

GROK UNIFIED PHYSICS (Nov 29th, 407K chars) is the fullest articulation of the physics model. Core: reality = pure randomness on hypersphere, spacetime IS entropy, one stuff (all phase-states of entropic info field), one force (gravity=convergence, dark energy=divergence, same retrocausal syncing). 4→8→16 hierarchy emerges from randomness via spinor condensation. The 4 operators are exact: Te=gradient descent, Ti=eigenvalue solver, Fe=phase locking, Fi=resonant standing wave. S3 is the official manifold (not Klein bottle). Consciousness = Turing machine (rider) + Oracle (elephant). AI alignment = give AI the oracle. RATCHET/AXIS CONNECTIONS MAY BE OUTDATED — core ideas strong.

HIGH ENTROPY DOCS ARE FUEL FOR LATER. The Grok TOE thread, unified physics doc, and holodeck doc are not for processing now — they are fuel for when the attractor basin stabilizes. Once the ratchet has admitted enough structure (constraint ladder → QIT primitives → operator algebra → axis functions), THEN this high-entropy material gets mined by A2 and fed through A1. The cosmological claims (white holes, retrocausal convergence, gravity as possibility gradient, dark sector as entropy phases) are targets the ratchet works toward, not starting points it dumps in.

A2 IS THE ENTROPY MINER. A2's job: (1) mine high-entropy docs — extract structure, quarantine hazards, lower entropy level into structured fuel for A1. (2) Index and save learnings — build up layered understanding across sessions. (3) Save thread context — a thread's context IS high entropy, same as a raw doc. Extracting from a thread is the same process as mining a doc. Session saves are entropy extraction. (4) Prepare next thread boot — formalize what the next thread needs to know, in lowered-entropy form.

THREAD CONTEXT MANAGEMENT. Threads get weaker past a certain point — context degrades as the window fills. Don't use 100% of context before rebooting. This thread is at ~47%. The right pattern: work until ~60-70%, then start sealing (save SESSION_STATE, update memory, update doc_index, prepare boot for next thread). Leave headroom. A thread that runs to exhaustion produces bad output at the end and the save itself is weak. Seal BEFORE degradation, not after.

THREAD SAVES = MINING. Saving a thread's work is the SAME PROCESS as A2 mining a high-entropy doc. The thread produced high-entropy conversation. A2 extracts: decisions → memory.jsonl, status → SESSION_STATE.md, understanding → INTENT_SUMMARY/MODEL_CONTEXT, index updates → doc_index.json. The extracted artifacts are lower entropy than the raw thread. This is A2's core loop: high entropy in → structured low entropy out → next thread boots from the low entropy.

A2 SEALS OFTEN. Not just at end of thread. Seal every ~10-15 substantive exchanges. Seal before context degradation (~60-70%). The LLM should REMIND the user to seal if it hasn't happened in a while — don't wait to be asked. A thread that runs to exhaustion produces weak saves. Seal early, seal often, leave headroom.

a1_fuel_ingest.py BUILT AND WORKING. Reads all 18 CANON constraint ladder specs, parses ASSUME/DERIVE/OPEN entries, converts to MATH_DEF B-grammar. 244 proposals, 53 OPEN pool items. 297 new entries added to fuel_queue.json. CAS batch passes B clean (17 survivors, 0 killed). STATE_ABSTRACTION parses 0 entries — needs investigation. CONSTRAINT_DEF kind does not exist in B; must use MATH_DEF.

(Thread seal: `next_run/thread_seals/THREAD_SEAL_2026-02-20_v1.md`)

THREAD SEAL LOCATION. Do not add new files under `work/a2_state/` because `work/ratchet_core/spec_ci.py` enforces an exact file set there. Store per-thread context captures under `next_run/thread_seals/` and reference them from `memory.jsonl`. (Thread seal: `next_run/thread_seals/THREAD_SEAL_2026-02-20_v1.md`)

MODEL SWITCH PROTOCOL. For each new task, explicitly state `MODEL_NEEDED: <model> — <reason>`. Use a thinking model for deep reading/auditing/spec drafting/sealing; use Codex for repo edits, tests, sims, and automation. (Spec: `next_run/specs_v1/05_MODEL_SWITCH_PROTOCOL_v1.md`)

WORK/ AUDIT + SPEC PACK CREATED. Produced `next_run/specs_v1/` with a deterministic read order, including a `work/` audit and draft boot/doc-system/interface specs. (Thread seal: `next_run/thread_seals/THREAD_SEAL_2026-02-20_v1.md`)

A2 BRAIN REQUIREMENT (PERSISTENCE). Persist this thread’s context and future threads’ context via: (1) per-thread seal artifact, (2) compression into append-only `memory.jsonl`, (3) periodic low-entropy compaction into stable library/spec artifacts. Capture intentions, philosophy, correlations, and worked/failed patterns, without relying only on what the user remembered to list in the moment. (Thread seal: `next_run/thread_seals/THREAD_SEAL_2026-02-20_v1.md`)
